## Community Theme Submission

**Theme Name:** <!-- e.g. Ocean Blue -->
**Theme ID:** <!-- e.g. ocean-blue-a3x9 -->
**Format:** <!-- Basic (JSON) / Advanced (TS) -->

### Description

<!-- Brief description of your theme's design inspiration and style -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Theme JSON passes schema validation (`community-theme.schema.json`)
- [ ] Theme ID follows `{name}-{4-char-suffix}` format
- [ ] Theme ID is unique (no collision with official or existing community themes)
- [ ] Preview image included (PNG, 800×500 px, ≤200KB)
- [ ] Preview image filename matches `{theme-id}-preview.png`
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] All token values are valid (hex colors, numbers within range)
